title: Cross-JSON data consistency validation — 12 new integrity tests
description: New cross-data-consistency.test.js validates relationships between 19 JSON data files: prisoner-alert cross-references, sanctions-officials overlap, route path validity, category validation, date ordering, correct party naming enforcement, date format consistency, and non-empty content checks.

title: Full test coverage — all pages now have dedicated tests
description: New ResistanceDirectory.test.jsx with 22 tests: header, stats, search filtering, category pills, dropdown filter, organization card expansion/collapse, aria-expanded, no-results state, footer, IPACMembers, GlobalDisclaimer, no-hashtags compliance. Every page in the app now has dedicated test coverage.

title: Profile page test coverage — all 15 profiles tested
description: New profile-pages.test.jsx with 144 tests: renders, names, Chinese names, status badges, back links, tab navigation, Sources section with CCP source exclusion, ARIA accessibility, no-hashtags compliance, and data integrity for all 15 political prisoner profiles.

title: No-hashtags policy + design system — 10 automated checks
description: Automated no-hashtags enforcement test (5 tests). 10th design system check for text-slate-600+ violations. Fixed 3 text contrast violations. DataSources page tests (15 tests). URL validation across 19 data files.

title: Design system enforcement — 9 automated checks
description: Fixed 10 text contrast violations across 8 files. Added automated text-slate-500 enforcement test. All readable text now verified text-slate-400 or brighter.

title: Data Export now provides real researcher data
description: DataExport component upgraded: downloads real data from 7 JSON datasets (prisoners, sanctions, facilities, officials, companies, organizations, police stations) in JSON, CSV, or Markdown format.

title: Joshua Wong hearing alert added
description: CRITICAL alert: Foreign collusion hearing at High Court on March 6, 2026. Carries maximum life imprisonment.

title: Political prisoner count updated to 63
description: Kwok Yin-sang case added — first family prosecution under Article 23. Father of US-based activist Anna Kwok, sentenced 8 months.

title: Sanctions database verified current
description: All 47 sanctioned entities verified against US Treasury SDN, UK FCDO, and EU Council lists. US Mar 2025 round (6 HK officials for transnational repression) confirmed included.

title: Jimmy Lai fraud conviction overturned on appeal
description: Hong Kong Court of Appeal overturns separate fraud conviction — however, 20-year NSL sentence remains in effect.

title: New case: Kwok Yin-sang (Article 23 prosecution)
description: First family member prosecuted under Hong Kong's Article 23 legislation. Father of US-based activist Anna Kwok, charged with 'colluding with external forces'. Sentenced to 8 months.

title: Joshua Wong HK47 appeal dismissed
description: 4-year 8-month subversion sentence upheld. Amnesty International condemns decision. Separate foreign collusion charge (max: life) still pending.

title: Jimmy Lai sentenced to 20 years
description: Harshest sentence ever imposed under Hong Kong's National Security Law. Found guilty on all charges including conspiracy to collude with foreign forces.

title: UN forced labor report published
description: United Nations publishes January 2026 report on forced labor in Xinjiang. Documents ongoing state-imposed labor transfer programs and supply chain links.

title: UFLPA entity list updated to 144 companies
description: US Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act entity list grows to 144 banned companies. 37 entities added in January 2025 round.

title: Jimmy Lai found guilty on all NSL charges
description: Hong Kong court convicts pro-democracy media tycoon on all 3 National Security Law charges. Sentencing to follow.

title: NSL arrest statistics updated
description: Hong Kong NSL data: 386 arrested, 176 convicted to date. Statistics sourced from Hong Kong Watch and CECC reports.

title: Gao Zhisheng profile enriched
description: Added wife Geng He's August 2025 Capitol Hill testimony appealing for international help locating her disappeared husband.
